title: Junior Investment Banker at NSE Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at NSE Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
NSE Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Ranchi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NSE Digital Technologies:
NSE Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSE Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
